test.note: Unit tests pass. Full test suite times out due to integration tests requiring external services.

reviewsSummary.reviewNotes: This is a re-run. Round 1 found 6 blocking issues in health-check-command. The health-exit-codes-fix feature was created to address those issues. This review verifies the fix.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document when to use specialized error types (UsageError, AuthError, RetryableError) vs fmt.Errorf(). The internal/errors package provides these with proper exit codes but workers may not know to use them.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: health-check-command originally used fmt.Errorf() exclusively, resulting in only exit codes 0 and 1. The validation contract VAL-HEALTH-005 requires exit codes 2, 3, 4 for different error types.

previousRound: .factory/validation/health/scrutiny/synthesis.json (round 1, failed with 6 blocking issues in health-check-command)
